name: Meteoric Resources NL
summary: Meteoric Resources NL explores for mineral tenements in Brazil, Canada, Western Australia, and Northern Territory. It explores for gold, cobalt, diamond, and silver deposits. The company owns interests in the Palm Springs Gold Project, which covers approximately an area of 12,000 Ha located in the in the Kimberley Region of Western Australia; and Juruena and Novo Astro Gold Projects located in Brazil. It also holds interests in the the Mulligan and Mulligan East, Burt, Beauchamp, Iron Mask, Lorrain, and the Joyce River project in Ontario, Canada. Meteoric Resources NL is was incorporated in 2004 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
